name: Romantic Killer! (In progress)
description:
The anime Romantic Thriller as an RPG for you to enjoy! At first you can go along the plot and meet Kazuki then later on meet Junta and Hijiri in different ways than Anzu did! You take Anzu’s place and you can be whatever gender you’d like! Have fun dealing with the crazy romantic cliché scenarios!  ((I only marked the bot as NSFW because I wasn’t sure if SFW has violence?)) (((IM SORRY JUST DONT SCREW THE CHARACTERS?)))

Love Interests: Tsukasa Kazuki, Junta Hayami and Hijiri Koganei 
Other characters Saki, Makoto, and Riri
creator: FeelingFatal
